_comment: PRD-702 reference corpus — recorded Contentful Delivery API responses for the Acme marketing site. Six landingPage entries; en-US as the authored default; es-ES, de-DE, ja-JP per-locale overrides for five of them. The 'dpa' entry is authored only in en-US to exercise the fallback path (PRD-702-R8 / PRD-104-R10/R11 / PRD-202-R14). NO live Contentful API calls.

fields.title: Pricing
